steps.title: Identify the sentence's role
steps.content: The underlined sentence follows the claim that animals other than humans use tools. It names a specific animal and a specific tool-use behavior.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content: A compares how often sea otters use tools, C compares sea otters' intelligence with birds', and D shifts to human tool use. The sentence gives a concrete nonhuman tool-use example: sea otters using stones to open shells. The answer is B.
